title: Premium-Rate SMS Fraud
html: Stub. The dominant monetization for mobile malware in the 2009-2011 era — 24 of 46 samples in the Felt et al. survey. Stealthier than premium-rate calls (no busy line). Defense: require user confirmation per message (which ios already did). First mentioned in 2025 06 01 mobile malware credentials sms.

related.label: Mobile malware survey — credential theft, premium SMS, 2FA bypass, IMEI defenses
Mobile malware survey (Felt et al.) — methodology, data set, novelty/amusement, selling user info
